description: Companion pre-send fixtures for SC-05. Each entry drives a single invocation of tokenpak.companion.hooks.pre_send.run(payload) with the observer installed; SC-06 asserts the listed observer events materialize and validate against companion-journal-row.schema.json.

enrichable_tui_with_capsule.description: Long-enough prompt on a claude-code-tui session with an active capsule. _should_enrich returns True; capsule injection fires; journal row with entry_type='companion_savings' and source='hook.pre_send:capsule' is expected.

passthrough_tui_short_prompt.description: Short prompt on claude-code-tui without a capsule. _should_enrich still returns True (route is claude-code-*) but the capsule_file is absent AND the prompt is below min_query_tokens, so no companion_savings row is expected. Only the baseline pre_send journal row fires.

companion_disabled.description: TOKENPAK_COMPANION_ENABLED=0 short-circuits pre_send.run entirely. No observer events fire. Pins the early-return behavior so a regression that emits rows with companion disabled is caught.
